query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "self-improving language models with bidirectional evolutionary search" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) as a foundational methodology/canonical reference and (f) as a cross-vocabulary alt-cluster study, since it provides the comprehensive survey and roadmap for the specific intersection of Large Language Models and Evolutionary Algorithms (the "bidirectional evolutionary search" mechanism) that the user is investigating.
